heading: Rank: warrant officers

children.label: a
children.text: Among warrant officer grades, warrant officer grades of a higher numerical designation are senior to warrant officer grades of a lower numerical designation.

children.label: b
children.text: Rank among warrant officers of the same grade, and date of rank of warrant officers, is determined in the same manner as prescribed in for officers in grades above warrant officer grades.section 741 of this title
